mapper.select: SELECT p.PRODUCT_NO, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.STORAGE_TYPE, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STORAGE_TYPE_NAME, p.PROCESS_TYPE, pt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS PROCESS_TYPE_NAME, p.DIVISION_TYPE, dt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS DIVISION_TYPE_NAME, p.UNIT_TYPE, ut.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS UNIT_TYPE_NAME, p.SALE_TYPE, slt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS SALE_TYPE_NAME, p.SELLER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME AS SELLER_NAME, p.COST_PRICE, p.VAT_AMOUNT, p.AUTO_VAT_YN, p.SALE_PRICE, p.SALE_STATUS, ss.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS SALE_STATUS_NAME, p.DISPLAY_YN, p.SALE_START_DATE, p.SALE_END_DATE, p.REG_DT, p.MOD_DT FROM TB_BUNDLE_PRODUCT p LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON p.SELLER_ID = m.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON p.STORAGE_TYPE = st.DETAIL_CODE AND st.GROUP_CODE = '001' AND st.CODE = '001001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE pt ON p.PROCESS_TYPE = pt.DETAIL_CODE AND pt.GROUP_CODE = '001' AND pt.CODE = '001003' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE dt ON p.DIVISION_TYPE = dt.DETAIL_CODE AND dt.GROUP_CODE = '001' AND dt.CODE = '001002' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE ut ON p.UNIT_TYPE = ut.DETAIL_CODE AND ut.GROUP_CODE = '001' AND ut.CODE = '001004' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE slt ON p.SALE_TYPE = slt.DETAIL_CODE AND slt.GROUP_CODE = '007' AND slt.CODE = '007002' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE ss ON p.SALE_STATUS = ss.DETAIL_CODE AND ss.GROUP_CODE = '007' AND ss.CODE = '007001' WHERE p.PRODUCT_NO = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BUNDLE_PRODUCT ( PRODUCT_NAME, STORAGE_TYPE, PROCESS_TYPE, DIVISION_TYPE, UNIT_TYPE, SALE_TYPE, SELLER_ID, COST_PRICE, VAT_AMOUNT, AUTO_VAT_YN, SALE_PRICE, SALE_STATUS, DISPLAY_YN, SALE_START_DATE, SALE_END_DATE ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{storageType}, #{processType}, #{divisionType}, #{unitType}, #{saleType}, #{sellerId}, #{costPrice}, #{vatAmount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{autoVatYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{salePrice}, #{saleStatus}, #{displayYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{saleStartDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{saleEndDate, jdbcType=DATE} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BUNDLE_PRODUCT SET PRODUCT_NAME = #{productName}, STORAGE_TYPE = #{storageType}, PROCESS_TYPE = #{processType}, DIVISION_TYPE = #{divisionType}, UNIT_TYPE = #{unitType}, SALE_TYPE = #{saleType}, SELLER_ID = #{sellerId}, COST_PRICE = #{costPrice}, VAT_AMOUNT = #{vatAmount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, AUTO_VAT_YN = #{autoVatYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, SALE_PRICE = #{salePrice}, SALE_STATUS = #{saleStatus}, DISPLAY_YN = #{displayYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, SALE_START_DATE = #{saleStartDate, jdbcType=DATE}, SALE_END_DATE = #{saleEndDate, jdbcType=DATE}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
